title: All At Once
description:
Smelt Raw Ore Blocks into their respective Smelted material blocks :D
Compatible with many other mod's ores, Mostly focused on supporting "All The Ores" mod's Ores.
body:
This mod Does stuff.

does what?
It makes Raw Ore blocks smeltable into their respective blocks (eg. Raw Iron Ore Blocks into Iron Blocks)
And it is also compatible with All The Ores mod. also smelting their mod's Raw ore blocks into smelted block type.
and.. that's it. a slight convenience stuff. i don't know if there is any similar mod to this but here you go.
Feel Free to Include in any mod pack. crediting me is not required but it would be cooler!

 

Balancing: the process time it takes to smelt a raw ore block is 9x the smelt time of a normal single raw ore. (10s for smelt/5s for blast : 90s/45s for smelting/blasting Raw ore blocks)
so in total, its about same as just smelting 9 regular raw ore into 9 smelted ingots. still, you get 9 times storage on your smelt input slot for raw ores(sorta).

Original Png used in logo https://www.reddit.com/r/PhoenixSC/comments/mrww8v/117_is_secretly_a_beans_update/
